theme: alchemist recompresses an exploded formula scroll
title: Recompressed Scroll: Minimal-Product Circuit for Shared Hidden Factors
strategies: one product-chain per distinct expanded monomial with shared powers (trivial baseline)
generic common-subexpression elimination on the monomial list (greedy, the obvious optimization)
recover the hidden shared linear factorization via non-co-occurrence blocks + coefficient ratios, share factors as a DAG (strong)
cross-target sub-product sharing / optimal vector-addition-chain below the per-target factored bound (open ceiling, uncovered)
